pages.text: Everyone tells Zanele that numbers are all around her. But no matter how hard she tries, she can’t see them.

blocks.text: Everyone tells Zanele that numbers are all around her. But no matter how hard she tries, she can’t see them.

pages.text: Zanele asks Gogo to help her see some numbers. Gogo points to the jars on the shelf and counts, “one, two, three, four.”

blocks.text: Zanele asks Gogo to help her see some numbers. Gogo points to the jars on the shelf and counts, “one, two, three, four.”

pages.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are jars!”

blocks.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are jars!”

pages.text: Zanele asks Mom to help her see some numbers. Mom points to the carrots in the garden and counts, “one, two, three, four.”

blocks.text: Zanele asks Mom to help her see some numbers. Mom points to the carrots in the garden and counts, “one, two, three, four.”

pages.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are carrots!”

blocks.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are carrots!”

pages.text: Zanele sees Linda counting the chickens, to see if they have all come back home.

blocks.text: Zanele sees Linda counting the chickens, to see if they have all come back home.

pages.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are chickens!”

blocks.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are chickens!”

pages.text: Zanele sees Auntie counting the hours until supper.

blocks.text: Zanele sees Auntie counting the hours until supper.

pages.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are hours!”

blocks.text: But Zanele is unhappy. “Those aren’t numbers. Those are hours!”

pages.text: Zanele can’t see the numbers in the world. She goes to speak to her sister, Gugu, who is eight years old and knows everything.

blocks.text: Zanele can’t see the numbers in the world. She goes to speak to her sister, Gugu, who is eight years old and knows everything.

pages.text: “If you look at anything in the right way, you can see a number in it,” says Gugu. Gugu gives Zanele a pair of magic glasses and tells her to go look for numbers in the world.

blocks.text: “If you look at anything in the right way, you can see a number in it,” says Gugu.
Gugu gives Zanele a pair of magic glasses and tells her to go look for numbers in the world.
